steps.title: Look for parallel lines
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines have the same slope but different y-intercepts.

steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content:
The equations
$$y=6x+3$$
and
$$y=6x+9$$
both have slope $6$, but their y-intercepts are $3$ and $9$. These lines are parallel and never intersect. The answer is A.
